title: Sprint 54: Fix LLM evaluator never called during build stalls (forceEvaluate)
description:
Root cause: _cycleOutcomes always contains all-success outcomes for build goals because PlaceBlock is fire-and-forget — CallWithOutcomeAsync returns success immediately on dispatch. Real failures (timeouts, skips) appear later in _correlatedActions, not _cycleOutcomes. The evaluator fast-path 2 (failureCount==0) always triggers for builds, so the LLM is never called during stalls.

Fix: Added forceEvaluate parameter to ILlmEvaluator.EvaluateAsync. When true, bypasses fast-paths 1 (too few outcomes) and 2 (all succeeded). TryLlmReplanOnStallAsync now passes forceEvaluate:true — the governor stall declaration IS the failure signal.
